title: (Bullish Signal) NGVT, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 25, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 41 similar cases, and 33 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 80%. Current price $76.53 crossed the resistance line at $73.02 and is trading between $76.63 resistance and $73.02 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/23/21 - 03/25/21, the price experienced a +6% Uptrend, while the week of 03/18/21 - 03/25/21 shows a -4% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/7cadulcujfp61.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=44685f7212e1b5d8eb0ecd695e0d033a360ad056

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 2 days, which means it's wise to expect a price bounce in the near future.

NGVT moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 25, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for NGVT crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on March 11, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. c13 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

Following a +3.13% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where NGVT advanced for three days, in 231 of 309 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 209 of 281 cases where NGVT Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 74%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10189609-ingevity-s-ngvt-74-04-price-moved-above-its-50-day-moving-average-on-march-25-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
